channel.title: Recon 6 — R6 Siege Strategy Updates
channel.description: Latest map guides, operator analysis, and ranked strategy from Recon 6.

item.title: Bank Strategy Guide — Ranked Loadouts, Callouts, Bans

item.title: How to Climb from Bronze to Silver in Apex Legends (2026 Guide)
item.description: Apex Bronze-to-Silver — pick 3 legends, master slide-jumping, edge-drop instead of hot-drop, loot priority by tier, and squad-up before pushing.

item.title: How to Climb from Diamond to Master in Apex Legends (2026 Guide)
item.description: Apex Diamond-to-Master — final-ring positioning depth, ult chain combos, loadout optimization at scale, third-team timing reads, and ALGS-tier macro discipline.

item.title: How to Climb from Gold to Platinum in Apex Legends (2026 Guide)
item.description: Apex Gold-to-Plat — endgame positioning, ult coordination chains, beam discipline, ring 4+ commit decisions, and pro-tier movement habits.

item.title: How to Climb from Master to Predator in Apex Legends (2026 Guide)
item.description: Apex Master-to-Predator — top 750 mental game, constant ult tracking, mid-game flex decisions, ALGS-tier squad coordination, and aim consistency at the ceiling.

item.title: How to Climb from Plat to Diamond in Apex Legends (2026 Guide)
item.description: Apex Plat-to-Diamond — endgame zone reads, mobility chain rotations, anti-flank discipline, lobby-by-lobby loadout swaps, and ALGS-tier engagement decisions.

item.title: How to Climb from Silver to Gold in Apex Legends (2026 Guide)
item.description: Apex Silver-to-Gold — squad coordination, ring rotation reads, third-party awareness, ult cycle timings, and the loot-vs-fight decision.

item.title: Bank Defense Setups (Ranked): Every Bomb Site, Anchors, and Reinforcements
item.description: The complete Bank defense guide for ranked R6 — CEO, Open Area, Tellers, and basement Lockers/CCTV. Who to anchor, which walls to trick, and how to deny the plant.

item.title: Border Defense Setups (Ranked): Every Bomb Site, Anchors, and Reinforcements
item.description: The complete Border defense guide for ranked R6 — Armory/Archives, Workshop/Ventilation, Customs/Supply, and Bathroom/Tellers. Wall tricks, roam timing, and plant denial.

item.title: Calypso Casino Defense Setups (Ranked): Every Bomb Site, Anchors, and Reinforcements
item.description: The complete Calypso Casino defense guide for ranked R6 — Cigar/Pool, Blackjack/Poker, CCTV/Vault, and Bar/Betting. Who to anchor, which walls to trick, and how to deny the plant.

item.title: Chalet Defense Setups (Ranked): Every Bomb Site, Vertical Threats, and Anchors
item.description: The complete Chalet defense guide for ranked R6 — Master/Office, Bar/Gaming, Kitchen/Trophy, and Wine Cellar/Snowmobile. Who to anchor, what to reinforce, and how to shut down the vertical.

item.title: Clubhouse Defense Setups (Ranked): Every Bomb Site, Anchors, and Reinforcements
item.description: The complete Clubhouse defense guide for ranked R6 — Cash/CCTV, Bar/Stock, Church/Arsenal, and Gym/Bedroom. Who to anchor, which walls to trick, and how to deny the plant.

item.title: Coastline Defense Setups (Ranked): Every Bomb Site, Anchors, and Reinforcements
item.description: The complete Coastline defense guide for ranked R6 — Hookah/Billiards, Theater/Penthouse, Kitchen/Service, and Blue Bar. Utility stacking, roam timing, and plant denial.

item.title: How to Climb from Bronze to Silver in Call of Duty (2026 Guide)
item.description: CoD Bronze-to-Silver — meta loadout (AR + SMG combo), Warzone drop spots, recoil control, slide-cancel movement, and ring rotation timing.

item.title: How to Climb from Diamond to Iridescent in CoD Ranked (2026 Guide)
item.description: CoD Diamond-to-Iridescent — pro-tier macro round patterns, lobby-by-lobby reads, killstreak banking, mental game, and CDL-tier comm discipline.

item.title: How to Climb from Gold to Plat in Call of Duty Ranked (2026 Guide)
item.description: CoD Gold-to-Plat — map-specific positioning, killstreak chain optimization, anti-flank discipline, SnD utility timing, and pro VOD prep.

item.title: How to Climb from Iridescent to Top 250 in CoD Ranked (2026 Guide)
item.description: CoD Iridescent-to-Top 250 — top-tier mental game, mechanical aim consistency at the ceiling, CDL-tier macro patterns, sensitivity optimization, and queue veto.

item.title: How to Climb from Plat to Diamond in Call of Duty (2026 Guide)
item.description: CoD Plat-to-Diamond — loadout drop timing, killstreak management, third-party prevention, end-game crystal positioning, and pro VOD prep.

item.title: How to Climb from Silver to Gold in Call of Duty Ranked (2026 Guide)
item.description: CoD Silver-to-Gold — full meta loadout setup, recoil control patterns, slide-cancel movement, audio cues, and SnD-specific positioning fundamentals.

item.title: Consulate Defense Setups (Ranked): Every Bomb Site, Anchors, and Reinforcements
item.description: The complete Consulate defense guide for ranked R6 — Consul/Meeting, Piano/Exposition, Tellers/Servers, and Garage/Cafeteria. Who to anchor, what to reinforce, and how to deny the plant.

item.title: How to Climb from DMG to Legendary Eagle in CS2 (2026 Guide)
item.description: DMG-to-LE is synced executes + spawn-peek timing + AWP rotation + off-angle holds + counter-flank reads. The pro-style refinements that close the gap.

item.title: How to Climb from LE to LEM in CS2 (2026 Guide)
item.description: LE-to-LEM is macro reads — utility tracking across the match, comp swap per round, pro-aim consistency, tilt protection round 13+, and map veto strategy.

item.title: How to Climb from LEM to Supreme Master First Class in CS2 (2026 Guide)
item.description: LEM-to-Supreme is pro-VOD prep, map-specific pro setups, mid-match strat switching, enemy economy reads round 12+, and tier-1 communication discipline.

item.title: How to Climb from Master Guardian to DMG in CS2 (2026 Guide)
item.description: MG-to-DMG is utility coordination + pro-style positioning — surgical smokes, trade-frag distance, defendable plant spots, round-3 economy lever, and opponent reads.

item.title: How to Climb from Gold Nova to Master Guardian in CS2 (2026 Guide)
item.description: Nova-to-MG is map mastery + smoke lineups + economy reads — three-map focus, five must-know smokes, trade-frag positioning, and AWP discipline.

item.title: How to Climb Out of Silver in CS2 (2026 Guide)
item.description: Specific tactics that win Silver rounds in CS2 — crosshair placement, AK-47/M4 discipline, plant spot selection, full-buy economy, and the must-know smoke lineups.

item.title: How to Climb from Supreme Master to Global Elite in CS2 (2026 Guide)
item.description: Supreme-to-Global is macro round structure, mechanical reset, pro-aim consistency, enemy emotional reads, and matchmaking veto strategy.

item.title: Dota 2 Beginner Guide 2026 — Climb From Herald to Guardian
item.description: Dota 2 beginner guide: pick a position, learn last-hitting, understand the 5-role system, ward basics, hero pool. Climb out of Herald.

item.title: How to Climb from Crusader to Archon in Dota 2 (2026)
item.description: Dota 2 Crusader-to-Archon — lane phase efficiency, Roshan timing, smoke gank coordination, ward priority, mid-game team fight reads.

item.title: Dota 2 Hero Tier List 2026 — Best Picks Per Position
item.description: Dota 2 hero tier list 2026 by position. S-tier Pos 1 carries, A-tier Pos 2 mids, situational Pos 3/4/5 picks. Solo Q meta breakdown.

item.title: Dota 2 Item Builds Guide 2026 — Best Items Per Position
item.description: Dota 2 item builds guide 2026: Pos 1 Battle Fury / Manta / Black King Bar paths. Pos 5 ward + sentry + force staff. Itemization for ranked.

item.title: Dota 2 Warding Guide 2026 — Vision Wins Games
item.description: Dota 2 warding guide: Observer + Sentry ward placement, rune spawn vision, anti-Pudge dewarding, Roshan pit vision, jungle ganking.

item.title: EA Sports FC 26 Beginner Guide — Climb FUT Rivals From Div 10
item.description: EAFC beginner guide for 2026: formation picks, custom tactics, FUT Rivals progression, skill move basics, defending controls, and the habits that get you to Division 5.

item.title: EAFC 26 Best Formations Tier List — FUT Rivals & Champions Meta
item.description: EA Sports FC formation tier list 2026: S-tier 4-2-3-1 Wide, A-tier 4-3-3 Attack, situational 5-3-2 + 3-4-3. Tactical breakdown per division and game state.

item.title: EAFC 26 Custom Tactics Guide — High Press / Balanced / Park Bus
item.description: EAFC custom tactics guide: 3 presets (High Press, Balanced, Park Bus), depth + width settings, player instructions, when to switch in-match.

item.title: How to Climb from Division 5 to Elite in EAFC 26
item.description: EAFC Division 5 to Elite — advanced skill move combos, pro defending, tactic switching mid-game, FUT Champions prep, and the mental game that wins the weekend tournament.

item.title: EAFC 26 FUT Chemistry Guide — Maximize Stats & Build the Meta
item.description: EAFC 2026 chemistry guide: link rules, Hero & Icon impact, position cards, 23-chem squad building, meta chemistry chains for Mbappé / Haaland / Bellingham.

item.title: Emerald Plains Defense Setups (Ranked): Every Bomb Site, Anchors, and Reinforcements
item.description: The complete Emerald Plains defense guide for R6 — Admin/CEO, Gallery/Meeting, Bar/Lounge, and Kitchen/Dining. Who to anchor, what to reinforce, and how to deny the plant.

item.title: Favela Defense Setups: Every Bomb Site, Anchors, and Reinforcements
item.description: The complete Favela defense guide for R6 — Meth Lab/Packaging, Football Office/Bedroom, Biker Apartment/Bedroom, and Aunt Bedroom/Apartment. Who to anchor, what to reinforce, and how to deny the plant.

item.description: The Finals Bronze-to-Silver — pick a build (Light/Medium/Heavy), Cashout vs vault decisions, building destructibility basics, and 3-team awareness.

item.description: The Finals Diamond-to-Ruby — top-1% mental game, mechanical aim consistency, pro VOD library at scale, tournament-tier comm discipline, and queue veto strategy.

item.description: The Finals Gold-to-Plat — build synergy in 3-stacks, vault carry routes, Defib timing, anti-grenade positioning, and Cashout contest reads.

item.description: The Finals Plat-to-Diamond — anticipative Defib timing, multi-floor cashout holds, anti-grenade positioning, build synergy depth, and pro VOD prep.

item.description: The Finals Silver-to-Gold — synced 3-stack engagement, build-specific kit mastery, third-team timing reads, vault carry routes per map, and Defib timing.

item.description: Fortnite Zero Build Gold-to-Plat — endgame positioning, third-party reads, loot loadout priorities, mobility chain rotations, and ranked queue veto.

item.description: The complete Fortress defense guide for R6 — Bedroom/Commander, Dormitory/Briefing, Kitchen/Cafeteria, and Hammam/Sitting Room. Who to anchor, what to reinforce, and how to deny the plant.

item.title: Why You're Hardstuck in Rainbow Six (And It's Not Your Aim)
item.description: Hardstuck in R6 ranked? It's not your aim — it's your information economy. The habits, the pros worth studying, and the review protocol that actually moves rank.

item.description: LoL beginner guide for 2026: champion picks per role, last-hitting basics, lane phase fundamentals, jungle paths, objective control, and the 10 habits that get you to Bronze.

item.description: OW2 Master-to-GM — top 0.5% mental discipline, mechanical aim consistency at scale, hero pool depth, match-to-match macro reads, and OWCS-tier comp absorption.

item.title: How to Climb from Platinum to Diamond in Overwatch 2 (2026 Guide)
item.description: Plat-to-Diamond OW2 — round-by-round counter-picks, healing ult timing, overtime double-fight reads, comp swaps mid-match, and pro VOD prep.

item.title: How to Climb from Silver to Gold in Overwatch 2 (2026 Guide)
item.description: Silver-to-Gold OW2 — comp archetypes (dive/poke/brawl), ult chains, high ground positioning, map-specific hero picks, and team fight reset reads.

item.title: OW2 Stadium Economy Guide — Cash & Round Strategy (2026)
item.description: How OW2 Stadium's Cash economy works: round win/loss payouts, contribution bonuses, when to save vs spend, the loss-bonus trap, and the 6-round Cash budget that hits a power spike at R5.

item.title: OW2 Stadium Guide — Best Builds, Powers & Economy (2026)
item.description: Complete Overwatch 2 Stadium guide: how the BO7 round economy works, best Powers per hero, Item shop priorities (Weapon Power / Ability Power / Armor / CDR / Life Steal / Move Speed), tank vs DPS vs support build paths, and the round-economy mistakes that cost you the match.

item.title: OW2 Stadium Items Guide — When to Buy What (2026)
item.description: Complete OW2 Stadium item shop guide: Common vs Rare vs Epic tier strategy, diminishing returns per stat, hero-specific buy paths, and the round-by-round Cash budget that maximizes power-spike timing.

item.title: OW2 Stadium Tier List 2026 — Best Heroes Per Role
item.description: Updated Overwatch 2 Stadium tier list: S/A/B/C tiers for every hero in the Stadium pool, ranked by build ceiling, Power synergy, and BO7 round impact. Tank, DPS, and support breakdowns with reasoning per pick.

item.title: Presidential Plane Defense Setups: Every Bomb Site, Anchors, and Reinforcements
item.description: The complete Presidential Plane defense guide for R6 — Meeting/Office, Security/Cargo, Kitchen/Stateroom, and Work Room/Lobby. Who to anchor, what to reinforce, and how to deny the plant.

item.title: PUBG Beginner Guide 2026 — Climb From Bronze to Silver
item.description: PUBG beginner guide: drop strategy, loot priority, squad roles, basic gunplay, circle awareness. Get out of Bronze in 2 weeks.

item.title: PUBG Best Drop Spots Per Map 2026 — Hot, Mid, Edge Drops
item.description: PUBG drop guide 2026 across Erangel, Miramar, Sanhok, Vikendi, Taego, Deston. Hot drops for action, mid drops for tier-3, edge drops for safety.

item.title: PUBG Endgame Strategy Guide — Final Circle Tactics for the Win
item.description: PUBG endgame strategy: positioning for final circles, 3v1/4v1 finishes, smoke + grenade chains, high-ground holds, 1v4 clutch tactics.

item.title: How to Climb from Silver to Gold in PUBG (2026)
item.description: PUBG Silver-to-Gold guide: rotation reads, 3rd-party timing, compound holds, gunplay accuracy, squad coordination calls.

item.title: PUBG Weapon Tier List 2026 — Best AR, Sniper, SMG Picks
item.description: PUBG weapon tier list 2026: S-tier Beryl + M416 + Kar98k + AWM. A-tier AKM + SLR + UMP45. Loadout combos for ranked.

item.title: How to Climb from Bronze to Silver in Rainbow Six Siege (2026)
item.description: The Bronze-to-Silver leap in R6 Siege is map awareness — specific callouts, two-main operator focus, bomb-pair reinforcement discipline, and how to stop dry pushing.

item.title: How to Climb Out of Copper in Rainbow Six Siege (2026)
item.description: Specific tactics that win Copper rounds in R6 Siege — the 5 operators to main, drone discipline, reinforcement priority, and the round-losing habits to drop first.

item.title: How to Climb from Diamond to Champion in Rainbow Six Siege (2026)
item.description: Diamond-to-Champion is 5% mechanical, 95% mental + macro — utility economy, tilt management, opponent reads across the match, comp swap per round, and communication discipline.

item.title: How to Climb from Emerald to Diamond in Rainbow Six Siege (2026)
item.description: Emerald-to-Diamond is adaptability — opponent spawn rotation reads, off-meta picks situationally, late-round 1v1 reads, anti-roam clears, and per-round strat switching.

item.title: How to Climb from Gold to Platinum in Rainbow Six Siege (2026)
item.description: Gold-to-Plat is where the metagame matters — meta operator bans, Mira anchor angles, spawn-peek timing, post-plant cycling, and vertical destruction targeting.

item.description: Complete Ace guide for Rainbow Six Siege 2026. Hard Breach on attack. Best maps + sites, gadget breakdown, common mistakes, counter picks, and how to climb with Ace.

item.title: How to Climb from Platinum to Emerald in Rainbow Six Siege (2026)
item.description: Plat-to-Emerald is refined positioning — off-angle holds, run-out timing, vertical micro-destruction, anti-meta picks, and drone bait + re-engage tactics.

item.title: How to Climb from Silver to Gold in Rainbow Six Siege (2026)
item.description: The Silver-to-Gold leap is utility coordination — Thatcher EMP timing, hard breach combos, vertical play, Bandit tricking, and drone discipline.

item.title: R6 Y11S2.1 Patch Notes Breakdown — Dokkaebi Cooldown Nerf, Ash Buff & the Movement Change Nobody Noticed (July 2026)
item.description: Rainbow Six Siege Y11S2.1 patch is live: Dokkaebi Jegeo Payload gets a 7s cooldown, Ash breaching rounds buffed, Thatcher EMP radius up, Thorn nerfed, and the prone-cancel sprint-shoot tech is removed. What every change means for your ranked climb.

item.title: R6 Y11S2 Ranked Tier List: The Operators Actually Winning Rounds (Operation System Override)
item.description: The Operation System Override (Y11S2) ranked meta, from a coach's chair — not just who's S-tier, but how each operator actually wins you rounds when you're grinding to climb.

item.title: R6 Y11S2 Operation System Override — Calypso Casino, Dokkaebi Remaster, Ranked 3.0 (2026)
item.description: Complete guide to Rainbow Six Siege Y11S2 Operation System Override. New Calypso Casino map, Dokkaebi Jegeo Payload rework, XK23 Assault Rifle, Pulse/Mozzie/Gridlock buffs, and Ranked 3.0 system overhaul. Released June 2, 2026.

item.title: How to Climb from Bronze to Silver in Rocket League (2026)
item.description: Rocket League Bronze-to-Silver — ball cam fundamentals, basic positioning, flip stop habits, and the kick-off setup that wins half your starts.

item.title: How to Climb from Champion to Grand Champion in Rocket League (2026)
item.description: Rocket League Champion-to-GC — air dribble basics, advanced kickoff plays (fake-flip-cancel), pre-position vs reactive defense, and team comp coordination.

item.title: How to Climb from Diamond to Champion in Rocket League (2026)
item.description: Rocket League Diamond-to-Champion — speedflip mastery, advanced aerial mechanics, rotation discipline, boost denial, and callout discipline.

item.title: How to Climb from Grand Champion to Supersonic Legend in Rocket League (2026)
item.description: Rocket League GC-to-SSL — flip resets, musty flicks, pinch pass setups, frame-perfect mechanics, and tournament-level closeout discipline.

item.title: How to Climb from Gold to Platinum in Rocket League (2026)
item.description: Rocket League Gold-to-Plat — power slide cornering, fast aerial inputs, wave-dash recovery, defensive positioning, and ball-cam toggling.

item.title: How to Climb from Platinum to Diamond in Rocket League (2026)
item.description: Rocket League Plat-to-Diamond — speedflip kickoff intro, aerial control (yaw, pitch, roll), backboard reads, possession holding, no panic clears.

item.title: How to Climb from Silver to Gold in Rocket League (2026)
item.description: Rocket League Silver-to-Gold — rotation basics, the no-double-commit rule, half-flip recovery, and boost economy that wins 3v3 trades.

item.title: Skyscraper Defense Setups (Ranked): Every Bomb Site, Anchors, and Reinforcements
item.description: The complete Skyscraper defense guide for ranked R6 — Tea Room/Karaoke, Bedroom/Bathroom, Kitchen/BBQ, and Work Office/Exhibition. Who to anchor, which walls to trick, and how to deny the plant.

item.title: Stadium Bravo Defense Setups: Every Bomb Site, Anchors, and Reinforcements
item.description: The complete Stadium Bravo defense guide for R6 — Office/Target, Kids Dormitory/Dormitory, Piano/Living, and Piano/Kitchen. Who to anchor, what to reinforce, and how to deny the plant.

item.title: How to Climb from 1st Dan to Tekken King in Tekken 8
item.description: Tekken 8 1st Dan to Tekken King — frame data basics, matchup-specific punishes, oki mix-up game, Heat management, mental discipline for ranked grind.

item.title: Tekken 8 Beginner Guide — Climb From Beginner to 1st Dan
item.description: Tekken 8 beginner guide: character picks, BnB combos, defensive basics (sidestep, parry, KBD), Heat system, ranked progression. Get out of Beginner ranks.

item.title: Tekken 8 BnB Combos Guide — Essential Combos Per Character
item.description: Tekken 8 BnB combos for every meta character. Paul, Jin, Kazuya, King, Hwoarang, Reina, Asuka. Damage, difficulty, Heat extensions, wall enders.

item.title: Tekken 8 Matchup Chart 2026 — Hard / Even / Favorable Matchups
item.description: Tekken 8 matchup chart 2026 across S-tier and A-tier characters. Hwoarang vs Kazuya, King vs Lili, Bryan vs Jin, and the top 30 matchups every Tekken player needs.

item.title: Tekken 8 Character Tier List 2026 — Best Picks for Ranked
item.description: Tekken 8 tier list 2026: S-tier Mishimas + Hwoarang, A-tier Kazuya + Jin + King, B-tier mains. Pick rationale, win rate, matchup notes per character.

item.title: Theme Park Defense Setups (Ranked): Every Bomb Site, Anchors, and Reinforcements
item.description: The complete Theme Park defense guide for ranked R6 — Throne/Armory, Lab/Storage, Office/Initiation, and Bunk/Day Care. Who to anchor, which walls to trick, and how to deny the plant.

item.description: The complete Tower defense guide for R6 — Gift Shop/Lantern, Tea Room/Bar, Restaurant/Bird Room, and Exhibit/Media Center. Who to anchor, what to reinforce, and how to deny the plant.

item.description: Ascendant-to-Immortal is pro VOD prep + map-specific lineups + tilt management + utility economy across rounds + decisive comm discipline.

item.description: Bronze-to-Silver is map awareness — three-map focus, callout vocabulary, basic smokes by map, trade-frag positioning, and stop dry pushing.

item.description: Diamond-to-Ascendant is reading opponent comp + counter-strat per round + retake utility cycles + spawn-peek timings + agent role swap.

item.description: Gold-to-Plat is comp synergy + map-specific agent picks — Cypher on Bind, Killjoy on Ascent, Viper on Icebox. Plus post-plant lineups and Sova Recon Bolt timings.

item.description: Plat-to-Diamond is refined positioning — off-angle setups, Vandal vs Phantom range decisions, jiggle peek mechanics, agent ult timing reads, and counter-utility prep.

item.description: Silver-to-Gold is utility coordination — synced executes, Sage wall placement, Killjoy ult timing, post-plant lineups, and trade fragging at proper distance.

item.description: The complete Villa defense guide for ranked R6 — Aviator/Games, Trophy/Statuary, Kitchen/Dining, and Living/Library. Who to anchor, what to reinforce, and how intel wins the round.
